description: Dominican-inspired cocktail menu R&D website — interactive data viz + editorial storytelling

context.nextRnD: Negroni de Plátano Dorado — plantain infusion protocol

website.stack: Next.js 16 + TypeScript + Tailwind v4 + Framer Motion
completedPhases: Phase 1: Scaffold + data layer (Next.js, fonts, typed data)
Phase 2: Layout + nav + hero (SiteHeader, HeroSection, PhilosophySection)
Phase 3: Menu section + drink modal (CategoryTabs, DrinkCard, DrinkModal, DrinkRadar)
Phase 5: Supporting sections (Regional, Technique, R&D, SideProjects)
remaining: Visual polish pass — verify watercolor blobs, spacing, animation timing
website.fileCount: 30+ component files across data/, charts/, sections/, ui/, hooks/

recentDecisions: Pre-rendered watercolor SVG blobs (not live CSS blur — performance)
Tailwind v4 @theme inline for custom design tokens
Custom SVG for all charts (no chart library — 12 data points, full control)
Scrollytelling for dimensional analysis (sticky chart + scrolling narrative)
Horizontal bars for spirit distribution (FT/Economist principle, not donut)
